properties.name: Dwarka Circle / Dwarka Chowk
properties.note: Vital artery connecting Mumbai-Agra NH, Nashik Road, Panchavati, city centre and industrial routes; specifically upgraded for Kumbh readiness.

properties.name: Nashik Road-Dwarka corridor
properties.note: Key commuter and pilgrim corridor where minor breakdowns can create long tailbacks.

properties.name: Kathe Galli
properties.note: Named pinch point on Nashik Road-Dwarka stretch.

properties.name: Fame Signal
properties.note: Named signal choke point on Nashik Road-Dwarka stretch.

properties.name: Upnagar
properties.note: Named congestion area on Nashik Road-Dwarka stretch.

properties.name: Upnagar Junction
properties.note: Named congestion junction on Nashik Road-Dwarka stretch.

properties.name: Datta Mandir Signal
properties.note: Named signal choke point on Nashik Road-Dwarka stretch.

properties.name: Dr. Ambedkar Nagar
properties.note: Named congestion area on Nashik Road-Dwarka stretch.

properties.name: Mumbai Naka
properties.note: Likely spillover point when traffic bypasses Dwarka via Kathe Galli-Mumbai Naka.

properties.name: Panchavati / Ramkund access zone
properties.note: Main sacred bathing pressure area; private vehicles expected to be shifted to outer parking on peak days.

properties.name: Ramkund
properties.note: Core bathing site and crowd-density hotspot.

properties.name: Godavari Ghat approaches
properties.note: Cluster of bathing-ghat approaches needing pedestrian segregation and emergency access.

properties.name: Nashik Road Railway Station
properties.note: Major railway arrival node; Central Railway preparing holding areas, CCTV and announcements.

properties.name: Bitco Signal / Bitco Chowk
properties.note: Station-side control point and black-spot reference near Nashik Road.

properties.name: CBS / Central Bus Stand
properties.note: Inner-city transfer and parking corridor around CBS-Shalimar.

properties.name: Thakkar Bazaar / New Thakkar Bazar
properties.note: Historic Kumbh bus movement node near city core.

properties.name: Trimbak Road exit / Nashik-Trimbak Road
properties.note: Primary link from Nashik to Trimbakeshwar; expansion planned for Kumbh readiness.

properties.name: ABB Circle / ABB Signal
properties.note: Important western-side control point on Trimbak/Satpur movement.

properties.name: Adgaon
properties.note: Northern approach and historic outer parking belt.

properties.name: Jatra Hotel
properties.note: Northern approach black-spot area to monitor for pilgrim bus inflow.

properties.name: K.K. Wagh College / K.K. Wagh belt

properties.name: Ramsetu Bridge
